Lotus Harbor Public Company Limited — PDPA DSAR and retention workflow note for Thai SEA disclosure support.
Scope: shareholders, bondholders, employees, and candidates interacting with our investor relations or HR portals.
Identity verification may request one local identifier; example National ID: 1-2345-67890-12-3 (checksum invalid; copies must be masked).
Form fields (placeholders only): Full Name [________], Employee Code [000000], Taxpayer No. [T-__________], Passport No. [P________], Account Ref. [ACC-XXXXX].
Contact for DSAR: dpo@lotusharbor.co.th and privacy@lotusharbor.co.th; do not send passwords, OTPs, or wet signatures via email.
Public helpline for general inquiries (non-DSAR): Capital Markets Assistance Center 1400; calls may be recorded and are not linked to a person.
Data categories processed: role titles, work emails, business card data, and documents previously published under the Securities and Exchange Act.
MNPI safeguards: requests must not seek draft results, undisclosed M&A, or non-public board minutes; responses are limited to public or personal data unrelated to price-sensitive information.
Retention: DSAR logs kept 12 months; HR records per labor law kept 7 years; SEA disclosure archives retained as required for audit then anonymised.
Cross-border processing: certain IT support by Cloud Banyan Services Pte. Ltd. (processor, Singapore) under PDPA Section 28 commitments and standard contractual clauses.
We will reject requests that include generic numbers (e.g., 000-0000000) or public hotlines as identifiers, since they are not personal data under PDPA.
For regulator inquiries, we may share workflow evidence with the Thai capital markets regulator upon lawful request; no bank account or biometric data is collected in this process.
Already-announced financing facts (e.g., a previously public share placement date) may appear in responses but are not MNPI and are sourced from the company website.
If you are an employee, submit DSARs via the HR portal; if you are an investor, use the IR web form; paper forms marked “Form A: Data Subject Request” are available on request.
Processing time: acknowledge within 7 days, complete within 30 days unless an extension applies under PDPA; we may ask to re-confirm identity if details are inconsistent.
